description: Human-readable display name for the skill. If omitted, the directory name is used. Shown in skill listings and menus.

claude-code.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (optional, falls back to directory name)

cline.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (required) — must exactly match the directory name

codex.mechanism: YAML frontmatter key: name (optional — falls back to parent directory name if absent or empty; max 64 chars enforced after whitespace normalization)

copilot-cli.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (required per Agent Skills open standard)

gemini-cli.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (required); value should match the skill's directory name

kiro.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (required, slug-style identifier)

windsurf.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (required). Must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (e.g., deploy-to-staging, code-review). Used in UI listings and for @-mentions.
